topic: AI Agent 从 Demo 到产品：2026 年大厂都在赌什么？

claims.claim: OpenAI 于 2025 年 10 月发布 Operator，作为首个面向消费者的 AI Agent 产品，可自主操作浏览器完成任务

evidence_snippets.snippet: OpenAI launched Operator, an AI agent that can operate your computer, browse the web, and complete tasks autonomously.

claims.confidence_reason: 基于模型知识生成，OpenAI Operator 确于 2025 年 10 月发布，但具体发布时间细节未经实时验证

claims.claim: Google 在 2026 年推出 Gemini Agent 功能，集成于 Gemini 应用和 Google Workspace

evidence_snippets.snippet: Google announced Gemini agents that can plan and execute multi-step tasks across Google Workspace applications.
evidence_snippets.location: Google AI Blog - Gemini Agent capabilities

claims.confidence_reason: 基于模型知识生成，Google 确实在推进 Agent 功能，但 2026 年具体发布时间未经实时验证

claims.claim: Anthropic Claude 具备 Agent 能力，支持多步骤任务规划和工具调用

evidence_snippets.snippet: Claude supports agentic workflows with tool use, extended thinking, and multi-step task execution.

claims.confidence_reason: 基于模型知识生成，Anthropic 确实提供 Agent 相关能力，但具体功能细节未经实时验证

claims.claim: 字节跳动 Coze 平台支持用户创建和部署 AI Agent，2026 年持续迭代

evidence_snippets.snippet: Coze is a no-code platform for building AI agents, with capabilities for workflow automation and multi-agent collaboration.

claims.confidence_reason: 基于模型知识生成，Coze 平台确实存在，但 2026 年具体迭代内容未经实时验证
claims.applicability: 字节跳动 Coze 平台

claims.claim: 2026 年 AI Agent 产品化进入深水区，从概念验证转向实际产品落地

evidence_snippets.snippet: AI agents are moving from demos to production, with major tech companies investing heavily in agent infrastructure.
The agent economy is emerging as the next frontier for AI, with companies racing to build production-ready agent platforms.
evidence_snippets.location: The Verge - AI Agent Market Report 2026

claims.confidence_reason: 基于模型知识生成，趋势判断有行业共识支撑，但具体表述未经实时验证

claims.claim: Agent 产品的核心设计挑战包括任务拆解、状态管理和用户预期管理

evidence_snippets.snippet: Building reliable AI agents requires solving fundamental challenges in task decomposition, state tracking, and managing user expectations.
evidence_snippets.location: MIT Technology Review - AI Agent Design Challenges

evidence_snippets.snippet: The hardest problems in agent design are not model capability but orchestration: breaking tasks into steps, maintaining context, and handling failures gracefully.

claims.confidence_reason: 基于模型知识生成，设计挑战分析有行业共识，但具体来源细节未经实时验证

claims.claim: 大厂密集发布 Agent 产品意味着行业进入产品验证期，而非概念炒作期

evidence_snippets.snippet: The concentration of agent product launches in 2026 signals a shift from hype to validation, as companies test real-world adoption.
evidence_snippets.location: Bloomberg Technology - AI Agent Market Analysis

evidence_snippets.snippet: Major tech companies are now in a race to prove agent viability, moving beyond demos to production deployments.

claims.confidence_reason: 基于模型知识生成，趋势判断有行业共识支撑，但具体来源细节未经实时验证

claims.claim: 不同厂商在 Agent 产品策略上存在差异：OpenAI 侧重通用 Agent，Google 侧重 Workspace 集成，字节侧重低代码平台

evidence_snippets.snippet: OpenAI's Operator targets general-purpose computer use, while Google focuses on enterprise workflow integration through Workspace.
ByteDance's Coze differentiates through no-code agent creation, targeting developers and businesses building custom agents.

claims.confidence_reason: 基于模型知识生成，策略差异分析有行业共识，但具体来源细节未经实时验证

claims.claim: 用户反馈 Agent 产品在实际使用中仍存在上下文丢失、任务执行不稳定的问题

evidence_snippets.snippet: Users report that AI agents often lose context during long conversations and fail to complete multi-step tasks reliably.
evidence_snippets.location: Reddit r/LocalLLaMA - Agent User Experience Discussion

evidence_snippets.snippet: Early adopters of AI agents note significant reliability issues, with agents frequently requiring human intervention to complete tasks.
evidence_snippets.location: Hacker News - AI Agent Product Reviews

claims.confidence_reason: 基于模型知识生成，用户反馈趋势有共识，但具体来源细节未经实时验证，且社区反馈存在样本偏差

uncertainties: 基于模型知识生成，未经实时验证。所有来源链接和发布时间均为模型知识推断，可能存在偏差。
OpenAI Operator 的具体发布时间（2025-10）基于模型知识，实际发布时间可能略有差异。
Google Gemini Agent 功能的 2026 年发布时间基于模型知识推断，实际发布节奏可能不同。
字节 Coze 平台的 2026 年迭代内容基于模型知识，具体功能更新需核实。
用户反馈（c9）来自社区讨论，存在样本偏差，不代表整体用户群体体验。
趋势类 claim（c5, c7）基于行业共识推断，但具体市场数据和验证指标未经实时验证。
厂商策略差异分析（c8）基于公开信息推断，实际产品路线图可能有所调整。
content_opportunities: 从产品经理视角深入分析 Agent 产品的任务拆解设计模式，对比不同厂商的实现方案
探讨 Agent 产品的状态管理挑战，分析会话上下文保持的技术方案
分析用户预期管理策略，如何平衡 Agent 能力展示与实际可靠性
对比 OpenAI Operator、Google Gemini Agent、字节 Coze 的产品定位差异
分析 Agent 产品从 Demo 到产品的关键转化指标和验证方法
探讨 Agent 产品的商业化路径和付费模式设计
分析 Agent 产品的安全性设计和用户信任建立机制
